hero.title: Digital growth built on real experience
hero.description: GROPPI is a Belgian digital agency, founded in 2016. With a team of over 9 professionals, we help businesses and creators across Europe and the Middle East build a strong digital presence. Technology supports our work, but strategy and creativity remain human.

about.title: About GROPPI
about.subtitle: Our Story
about.description: GROPPI started in Belgium in 2016 and grew through years of hands-on experience, strong partnerships, and proven results. Today, we collaborate with clients across Europe and the Middle East, combining strategy, creativity, and technology to achieve sustainable digital growth.
about.missionText: Helping businesses grow through strategic digital solutions based on human expertise, supported by smart technology.
about.visionText: To be a trusted partner for businesses seeking sustainable digital growth, with a team that truly understands what works.
about.valuesText: Reliability, craftsmanship, transparency, and long-term relationships.

hero.title: Our journey started in Belgium in 2016
hero.text: GROPPI started in Belgium in 2016 with one clear vision: helping businesses build a strong and authentic digital presence. No trends for the sake of trends, but solutions that truly work.

qualification.headline: Start With Your Goal
qualification.description: Advertising success starts with a clear goal. Different goals require different budget levels to generate meaningful results.
qualification.note: Budgets below these levels may limit data collection and result accuracy.

leadGeneration.title: Lead Generation
leadGeneration.description: Allows enough data to optimize campaigns and generate qualified leads.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce Sales

brandAwareness.title: Brand Awareness
brandAwareness.description: Delivers effective reach and frequency for visibility.

transparency.headline: Full Budget Control
transparency.subheadline: You decide the budget. We maximize its performance.
transparency.description: Our advertising management fees cover strategy, setup, optimization, and reporting only. Advertising budgets are paid directly to platforms such as Google or Meta, giving you full transparency and control.
transparency.shortNote: Ad spend is paid directly to advertising platforms.

salesFlow.title: Our Collaboration Process
salesFlow.closingStatement: We guide the strategy. You control the budget. Results come from alignment between both.

budgetIncluded.question: Is the advertising budget included in the management price?
budgetIncluded.answer: No. Management fees cover strategy, setup, optimization, and reporting only. Ad spend is paid directly to advertising platforms.

smallBudget.question: Can I run ads with a very small budget?
smallBudget.answer: Yes, but very low budgets may not generate enough data for meaningful or measurable results.

whoDecides.question: Who decides the advertising budget?
whoDecides.answer: We recommend a budget based on your goal and market. You approve and control the final budget.

lowerBudget.question: What happens if I choose a lower budget than recommended?
lowerBudget.answer: Campaigns will be managed professionally, but performance and optimization may be limited due to insufficient data.

ai.title: Powered by Smart Technology
ai.description: We leverage modern technology to work more efficiently and deliver better results. Strategy and creative decisions always remain in the hands of our experienced team.

planBuilder.title: Plan Builder
planBuilder.subtitle: Build your social media plan and get an instant estimate.
planBuilder.disclaimer: This is an indicative price. Final pricing depends on scope, brand complexity, and content needs.
planBuilder.adsBudgetDisclaimer: Advertising budget is paid directly to Meta/Google and is not included in management costs.
planBuilder.adsBudgetNote: Advertising budget is paid directly to Meta/Google.
planBuilder.pauseNote: You can pause or stop whenever you want.

adjustLater.question: Can I adjust my plan later?
adjustLater.answer: Yes. You can adjust at any time. We align everything with your goals and evolution.

setupCost.question: Is there a setup cost?
setupCost.answer: Setup is included in the management fee. Extras only arise with additional scope or exceptional setup.

adBudgetIncluded.question: Is advertising budget included?
adBudgetIncluded.answer: No. Advertising budget is paid directly to Meta/Google. Our cost is for management and optimization.
